notes: I’ve tried many ways, with ProtonGE, Experimental, Hotfix. After registering and creating my character, the game closes, and from then on, every time I open it and click, it crashes.
title: Summoners War: Chronicles

notes:
I tried again on PikaOS (Debian base) after failed in CachyOS (Arch). It was not successful. Fail at the same area. These are what I've tried.
1. A few latest versions of Protons
2. Pre-cache shader enabled and disabled, Vulkan too.
3. I also tried installing Chinese Lunar Calendar just in case it was a dependency.

Nothing works so far, but this is what I have gathered.
I tried running it via commandline with `steam steam://rungameid/2167580`
The error shown during crash is something about preloading. Then there is adding PID. A check that PID one is not equal to another PID, skip destruction (fork without exec?).
I may not be successful, but someone knowing about proton and linux more than I do might notice something. Cheers.
